title: Ship 0.4.0
description: Bump package.json to 0.4.0. Run npm test, npm run build, commit, push. Verify sweech dashboard works end-to-end. Manual: real cross-machine restore.

context.text: Shipped 0.4.0 release metadata: package.json/package-lock.json now 0.4.0 and CHANGELOG v0.4.0 dated 2026-05-21. Release commit a2e9abd pushed to main. Gates passed: npm run build; npm test -- --runInBand (102 suites, 2469 passed, 5 skipped); PROJECT_SCREENSHOT_DIR=~/Desktop/screenshots/sweech npm run test:e2e:dashboard (6 Playwright tests); npm run typecheck:dashboard; npm audit --audit-level=moderate; swift build --package-path macos-menubar/SweechBar; git diff --check; node dist/cli.js --version returned 0.4.0; CLI help sanity; npm pack --dry-run --json produced sweech-0.4.0.tgz with README assets. UI proof screenshots reviewed in ~/Desktop/screenshots/sweech, including T-DASH-016-sse-filter-sort.png, T-DASH-010-sessions-panel-grid.png, T-DASH-010-sessions-panel-mobile.png, T-DASH-013-doctor-logs-plugins-templates-desktop.png, and T-DASH-014-settings-drawer-desktop.png. Cross-machine: mac-studio fast-forwarded to a2e9abd, built 0.4.0, /healthz reported version 0.4.0, signed MacBook -> mac-studio /fed/dashboard/state saw the seeded session, and signed /fed/dashboard/restore returned 200 with remote launcher proof for tmux attach. Direct Terminal.app launch from an SSH-started daemon returned 422 due macOS GUI automation, so the success proof used a Studio-hosted launcher stub while exercising real HMAC/state/restore over LAN. Initial Codex adversarial review only found the expected active-task procedural blocker before this writeback and a stale-count false positive; focused final re-review will run after this note.

Release metadata and automated/local gates are complete and pushed, but final manual real cross-machine restore remains blocked: mac-studio is upgraded to 0.4.0 and built successfully; signed MacBook -> mac-studio /fed/dashboard/state worked; signed /fed/dashboard/restore worked through a Studio-hosted proof launcher and produced the expected tmux attach command; however the real Terminal.app launch path from an SSH-started daemon returned 422/hung due macOS GUI automation permissions. T-DASH-018 remains blocked until the fed daemon is started in the logged-in macOS GUI session on Studio, or Terminal/Automation permission is granted and a real visible terminal restore succeeds. Also removed old tracked repo-root sweech-0.1.0.tgz artifact flagged by final adversarial review.
